text.message: Ns is never worth it Oj
I just gave u a spot
How on earth are u not robbing red
bro I’m not even doing that well
My win con is keep the robbing on 10s
you ruined my game so i end u
So ur saying I should be soloing u all game?
yes our win con should be to solo blue
Ur win con doesn’t matter if you feed red the game
I’m not teaming with anyone and also I’m not that ahead
Blue ur so bad at this game
blue p ing me off so bad
Your guy’s win rates say enough lol
Feed red if we have to
Well ur not winning this one
It’s gonna be red if not me or Oj
you a sub 30 win rate guy every season pipe down
You literally threw the last game I did with u
Ur not that good, u just feast on noobs
Red is destroying u on devs
Homie had an 11% win rate last season lmaooo
I’m trying to figure out if ur serious about understanding win cons
blue an emotional troll just report lets get out
Red is taking army and all the devs
What part about needing army do u not understand lmao
U didn’t even do a useful rob lol
Hit the 9 if devs are ur concern
Great play blue, u should be proud at how fast u lost this one
Hard to b upset when I’m getting blown while playing lmao
If that’s the case, idk what you’re doing with your life
Is that all there is to do in new found land?
That was the most embarrassing comeback I’ve ever heard in my life
Guy is trying to brag about getting head while playing catch
For all we know you could be lying
Red, I’ll help u pop devs if u help me take road
I’ve never seen someone care more about a game of catan
Red, if u want to get army, u need to slow blue
U should’ve been robbing him ages ago
Yeah but had u been robbing him earlier u would’ve had army
I was trying to feed u devs
Dudes giving everyone lessons but can’t win a game
Welp there’s nothing I can do so
I just gotta rob who’s ahead
I don’t regret robbing you black
I mean u traded me the city
I didn’t have it without that
I’ll clear my hand if you feed me road
That’s the win for u lol
Lol black could have just traded red
I remember when I first played catch
